/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/binary_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/data_win.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/data_win_print.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/debug_overlay.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/gml_array.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/gml_method.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/ini.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/input_recording.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/instance.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/json_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/json_writer.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/noop_audio_system.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/noop_file_system.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/profiler.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/runner.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/runner_keyboard.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/string_builder.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/vm.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/vm_builtins.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/ps3/main.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/ps3/ps3_file_system.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/ps3/ps3_renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/butterscotch.dir/src/ps3/stb_impl.c.o -o butterscotch  -lm
